selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a well-rounded understanding of the issues at hand. This involves recognizing the various forms of fake content, such as bots, propaganda, and disinformation, and their potential impact on society. It also requires staying informed about the latest developments in AI and social media, as well as being aware of any existing policies or regulations related to these topics. Additionally, it is important to engage with reliable sources of information and to critically evaluate the credibility of what you see online. "reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a well-rounded understanding of the issues at hand, recognize various forms of fake content, stay informed about latest developments in AI and social media, engage with reliable sources of information, critically evaluate credibility of online content, and contribute to more informed and responsible online community.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a well-rounded understanding of the issues at hand. This involves recognizing the various forms of fake content, such as bots, propaganda, and disinformation, and their potential impact on society. It also requires staying informed about the latest developments in AI and social media, as well as being aware of any existing policies or regulations related to these topics. Additionally, it is important to engage with reliable sources of information and to critically evaluate the credibility of what you see online. By taking these steps, individuals can better protect themselves from the negative effects of fake content and contribute to a more informed and responsible online community.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a well-rounded understanding of the issues at hand, recognize various forms of fake content, stay informed about latest developments in AI and social media, engage with reliable sources of information, critically evaluate credibility of online content, and contribute to more informed and responsible online community.
